When you visit the store, a slime appears and politely welcomes you.
He showed his gratitude by bending his round body with all his might.
He dexterously stretched out and handed you the money.
A short time later, he brought an item from the back of the store that he had fixed.
He gently offered you a piece of paper with the results of the appraisal on it.
I don't know how in the world he did it, but suddenly the curse ceased and the equipment disappeared.
